name: UNCULT
short_description: 'UNCULT' is a Adventure where the protagonist, the daughter of a cult leader, suffers from amnesia after an accident in a fanatical pseudo-religious group. Now, she must piece together her obscured past, facing numerous challenges and uncovering the truth. Your decisions will shape her destiny.
detailed_description:
※ Caution ※

Currently, UNCULT is in beta testing, but the update is delayed due to internal circumstances, so we will find it soon through the notice.
I recommend you to play after the beta test is over and the full version is released. Thank you.

※ Guidance on Real-time Streaming and Video Uploads ※

Currently, matters regarding real-time streaming and YouTube video uploads for are under internal review. We will provide further guidance on the allowed scope after the testing period concludes, following the official release date in July. Therefore, we kindly request that real-time broadcasting and video uploads be conducted after the official release date.

Rich and Realistic story

With various characters from the modern Korean virtual city of "Sein Metropolitan City" and the island region "Yeonwoo-Island.”, Go on a long and tough adventure. It is brimming with captivating plots and stunning graphics. Be careful not to be misled by beauty.
